title: cracca rigidula
intro: Cracca rigidula, also known as the stiff cracca or bush clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cracca rigidula are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Cracca rigidula typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications.
